title: Fit test - both earbuds are disconnected, not possible to start the Fit test [TO BE UPDATED]
scenario: Fit Test button remains disabled when both earbuds are disconnected from the Poly Studio Mobile app
steps: 1. Open the Poly Studio Mobile app on the Home screen.
2. Ensure both earbuds are disconnected from the app (not connected via Bluetooth).
3. Navigate to Home → Tutorials, Onboarding, User Guides → Fit Test.
4. Attempt to start the Fit test by tapping the Test button.
expected: The Test button should be enabled, allowing the user to start the Fit test even when both earbuds are disconnected.
